data.content:
This is an **Android tombstone** from a .NET MAUI app (`com.companyname.MauiTest`) that crashed with **SIGABRT** ("not compatible"). Let me identify the .NET runtime frames and attempt symbolication.

**Frames #01–#07** are all in `libmonosgen-2.0.so` (the Mono runtime). Let me try to download debug symbols using the ELF Build ID and symbolicate them.

arguments.command: which addr2line llvm-symbolizer llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep -i binutils 2>/dev/null | head -5

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
# Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server using ELF Build ID
# BuildId: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"

# Try various Microsoft symbol server URL formats
echo "=== Trying elf-buildid-sym format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying debuginfod format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/buildid/${BUILDID}/debuginfo"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying dotnet symbol server ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/${BUILDID}ffffffff/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying msdl with uppercase buildid ==="
BUILDID_UPPER=$(echo $BUILDID | tr 'a-f' 'A-F')
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID_UPPER}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
arguments.description: Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft

data.reasoningText:
This is an Android tombstone/crash log (not an Apple .ips file). The apple-crash-symbolication skill is specifically for Apple platform crashes, so it won't help here.

Let me analyze what we have:

1. **Crash type**: SIGABRT with abort message "not compatible"
2. **App**: `com.companyname.MauiTest` — a .NET MAUI app
3. **Runtime**: `libmonosgen-2.0.so` — the Mono runtime (used by .NET MAUI on Android)
4. **Architecture**: arm64
5. **BuildId**: `1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be`


6. **Crash frames**: The .NET runtime frames (#01-#07) are all in `libmonosgen-2.0.so`, so I need to get the debug symbols for that library using its BuildId, then use tools like `addr2line` or `llvm-symbolizer` to resolve the addresses — I could try pulling the symbols from Microsoft's symbol server. I'm trying different URL formats for the Microsoft symbol server to locate the ELF debug symbols, considering both the standard SymbolChecksum format and the debuginfod protocol that .NET's symbol server supports.

arguments.command: which addr2line llvm-symbolizer llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep -i binutils 2>/dev/null | head -5

# Try various Microsoft symbol server URL formats
echo "=== Trying elf-buildid-sym format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying debuginfod format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/buildid/${BUILDID}/debuginfo"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying dotnet symbol server ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/${BUILDID}ffffffff/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying msdl with uppercase buildid ==="
BUILDID_UPPER=$(echo $BUILDID | tr 'a-f' 'A-F')
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID_UPPER}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
arguments.description: Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft

toolArgs.command:
# Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server using ELF Build ID
# BuildId: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"

# Try various Microsoft symbol server URL formats
echo "=== Trying elf-buildid-sym format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying debuginfod format ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/buildid/${BUILDID}/debuginfo"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying dotnet symbol server ==="
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://symbols.nuget.org/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/${BUILDID}ffffffff/libmonosgen-2.0.so"

echo ""
echo "=== Trying msdl with uppercase buildid ==="
BUILDID_UPPER=$(echo $BUILDID | tr 'a-f' 'A-F')
curl -sSL -w "%{http_code}" -o /dev/null "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID_UPPER}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
toolArgs.description: Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft
